message:
feat(abi): implement strncmp with hardened bounds checking and export new symbols

Add strncmp() to string_abi.rs following frankenlibc's hardened pattern:
null pointer handling, runtime policy decisions for memory safety,
optional memory repair/healing, bounds checking against known allocated
regions, and instrumentation/observability hooks. Includes 3 unit tests
covering n=0 returns 0, count limit is respected, and NUL terminator
acts as comparison boundary.

Export three new symbols in GLIBC_2.2.5 version script (libc.map):
- memrchr (reverse memory scanning)
- strncmp (bounded string comparison)
- strtok_r (thread-safe tokenizer)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
